description: A color outdoor photograph showing, from behind, a person in tactical gear and helmet marked LA-10 and POLICE escorting a handcuffed man toward a house. The handcuffed man is bald with a tattoo on the back of his head and wears a dark long-sleeved shirt and jeans. Overlaid white text across the center reads YOU HAVE A CHOICE with a line below reading DHS.GOV/CBPHOME.
notable_text: YOU HAVE A CHOICE; DHS.GOV/CBPHOME; LA-10; POLICE
